overview: Personal portfolio website for Ashwin Singh Chouhan featuring Home, Research, Articles, Publications, Notes, About, and Contact sections — with a hidden admin panel for full content management, file uploads, and text editing across all sections.
features: Animated hero section with ASC circular logo branding
9 research project cards with golden sequence badges and full scientific content
Articles, Publications, and Notes sections with detail views
Admin can edit text and metadata across all 7 sections
File upload support for images and PDF documents
Rich text editing for long-form content
Responsive mobile-friendly design with hamburger menu
OKLCH design system with golden accents and dark mode
